name: Papa Louie 2
author: Poki
description: Papa Louie 2 is the deliciously action-packed sequel where food fights back! Join restaurant workers Marty and Rita as they battle evil radishes, bouncing onions, and other wild food enemies in a tasty forest adventure. Swap between characters, swing your spatula, and collect coins, burgers, and special treats along the way. Can you defeat the food army and become a true hero? How to play Papa Louie 2? Walk: the left and right arrow key Jump: the up arrow key Attack: the space bar Slide: the down arrow key Who created Papa Louie 2? Papa Louie 2 is created by Flipline Games. Play their other game on Poki: Papa Louie: When Pizzas Attack , Papa's Pizzeria , Papa's Scooperia and Papa's Freezeria ! How can I play Papa Louie 2 for free? You can play Papa Louie 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Papa Louie 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Papa Louie 2 can be played on your computer.
